Short CV

Derya Deniz graduated from Marmara University, Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Nursing in 2014. In 2019, she completed her master's degree with thesis in the Department of Obstetrics and Gynecology. Currently, she is continuing her doctorate education at Marmara University Obstetrics and Gynecology Nursing Department.
